subject: Urgent: Password Reset Required
body: Dear user, our system detected unusual activity on your account. Please click the link below to reset your password immediately to avoid suspension.
label: phishing
indicators: The email uses urgent language and a suspicious link from a domain that mimics a legitimate service. It requests password reset.

subject: Immediate Approval Needed for Invoice #9876
body: Hi team, I need the attached invoice approved by EOD. Please review and sign off. Thanks, CEO
label: phishing
indicators: Sender claims to be CEO, requests approval of invoice, uses urgency, attachment likely malicious.

subject: Important System Update Available
body: Please download the latest driver from the link below to keep your device secure. Failure to update may result in security risks.
label: phishing
indicators: Suspicious download link from fake domain, claims system update, low urgency but malicious.

subject: 您的發票已準備好 - 付款請盡快
body: 尊敬的客戶，您的發票已生成，請點擊下方連結完成付款，以免延遲。感謝您的合作！
label: phishing
indicators: Chinese language, urgent payment request, fake domain resembling PayPal, attachment likely malicious.

subject: アカウント確認が必要です
body: あなたのアカウントに不正ログインが検出されました。以下のリンクから確認してください。
label: phishing
indicators: Japanese language, suspicious verification link, fake domain, urgency.

subject: Project Plan Attachment
body: Hi all, please find the updated project plan attached. Let me know if any changes are needed. Regards.
label: phishing
indicators: Fake domain microsofts.com, attachment may contain malware, no urgency but BEC.

subject: Critical Driver Update Required
body: Your system requires an immediate driver update. Download from the link below to maintain security.
label: phishing
indicators: Urgent update claim, fake domain applemail, malicious download link.

subject: 付款提醒：發票 #2023-001 已到期
body: 請盡快完成付款以避免服務中斷。點擊下方鏈接查看發票細節。
label: phishing
indicators: Chinese text, urgent payment, fake domain twiter, link leads to phishing site.

subject: Account Verification Required
body: To keep your account secure, please verify your details by clicking the link below. This action is mandatory.
label: phishing
indicators: Generic verification email, suspicious domain outl0ok, link directs to phishing.

subject: 重要：本週會議議程
body: 本週的會議已更新，請在附件中查看最新議程並準備相關報告。
label: phishing
indicators: Fake domain faceb0ok, attachment potentially malicious, urgent meeting agenda.

subject: Security Patch Available
body: Download the latest security patch to protect your system from vulnerabilities. Click the link below.
label: phishing
indicators: Fake domain update.com, malicious download link, claims security patch.

subject: 收據已發送 - 請查收
body: 您的收據已發送至您的郵箱。若需查看，請點擊以下連結。
label: phishing
indicators: Chinese, fake PayPal-like domain, link leads to phishing site, attachment may be malicious.

subject: 二次認證失敗 - 立即更新
body: 您的帳戶因二次認證失敗被鎖定。請使用以下連結重置密碼以恢復訪問。
label: phishing
indicators: Urgent password reset, fake domain gmaill, phishing link.

subject: 請審核預算報告
body: 請審核附件中的預算報告，並於今天結束前提供回覆。
label: phishing
indicators: Fake domain, urgent budget review, attachment may be malicious.

subject: Monthly Report Delivery
body: The monthly report is ready. Click the link below to download the report. Please keep it confidential.
label: phishing
indicators: Suspicious download link from fake domain, claims confidential report, potential malware.
